mnemonics.title: FIRE Rules
mnemonics.content: FIRE: Facts (IF condition), Inferences (THEN action), Rule-based Engine. Remember the three core parts of a production system.

mnemonics.title: Forward vs Backward Chaining
mnemonics.content: Forward = Facts First (data-driven, start from known facts). Backward = Begin from Belief (goal-driven, start from hypothesis and work backward to prove it).
